_comment: Red Zone Jobs — Core Rules Appendix III (pp.89-91)
_rules_reference: Endgame content for experienced crews. Requires license to access.

threat_conditions.name: Comms Interference
threat_conditions.description: Each Reaction Roll phase, roll one die less than you normally would. A character not assigned a die will act in the Slow Actions phase.

threat_conditions.name: Elite Opposition
threat_conditions.description: All opponents with +0 Combat Skill are upgraded to +1. Ignore if not applicable to enemy type.

threat_conditions.name: Pitch Black
threat_conditions.description: Visibility is limited to 6 inches. This overrides any other visibility reductions.

threat_conditions.name: Heavy Opposition
threat_conditions.description: Increase the opposing force by +2 enemy.

threat_conditions.name: Armored Opponents
threat_conditions.description: All opponents with 3 Toughness are upgraded to 4. Ignore if not applicable to enemy type.

threat_conditions.name: Enemy Captain
threat_conditions.description: Add an additional Lieutenant with Combat Skill +2 and Toughness 5, regardless of the normal profile used.

time_constraints.name: Reinforcements
time_constraints.description: 3 additional enemy arrive from the center of either neutral battlefield edge. One of the arrivals is a Specialist.

time_constraints.name: Significant Reinforcements
time_constraints.description: 3 additional enemy arrive from neutral edge (1 Specialist). Additional enemies arrive from the center of the opponents' battlefield edge.

time_constraints.name: Count Down
time_constraints.description: Roll 1D6 each round hereafter. On a 1, the Battle ends immediately. Next round 1-2, then 1-3, etc. Must complete objective before clock runs out.

time_constraints.name: Evac Now!
time_constraints.description: The battle ends immediately. You do not Hold the Field, and you only Win if you have achieved your objective already.

time_constraints.name: Elite Reinforcements
time_constraints.description: A Unique Individual and 2 enemy (one of which is a Lieutenant) arrive. Place them at the center of the opponents' battlefield edge.

increased_opposition.description: Do not roll for opposing numbers. Base of 7 figures + any modifier from the enemy type. 3 Specialists (one is a Lieutenant). +1 to Unique Individual roll.

invasion_modifiers.description: All rolls for Invasion Threat are at +2. All rolls for Galactic War Progress are at -1.

improved_rewards.description: Hold the Field: +1 XP per survivor. Credits: roll twice, pick better. Quest finale: roll 3, pick best +1. Win: extra Loot roll.
